title: Telemetry Event
description: Schema for telemetry events emitted by activities, lessons, the scaffolding engine, the reward economy, and other runtime systems. Each event has a common envelope plus an event-specific payload validated against the event's catalog entry.

eventId.description: Unique ID for this event instance (typically a ULID or UUID).

eventName.description: Hierarchical name. Conventions: shared events use system namespaces (scaffold.*, economy.*, lesson.*, numwrite.*, notebook.*). Activity-defined events use the activity slug prefix (e.g., counting_parade.*, tenframe.*).

timestamp.description: When the event was generated, client-side.

activityId.description: Activity slug if the event was emitted from within an activity. Omitted for system-level events fired outside any activity.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of the payload. Allows backward-compat parsing as payload shapes evolve.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Validated against the event's entry in the telemetry catalog (data/telemetry-catalog/*.json).
